Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration [Ccp 1281.2]
Off Calendar Dec-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. HOLDEN W. STEIN APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
JOSEPH CONNELLY, OWNER OF VEG NEWS MEDIA, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF DEMOCRAT PRINTING AND LITHOGRAPHY COMPANY'S Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration [Ccp 1281.2] IS GRANTED. Respondent shall also pay Petitioner Democrat Printing and Lithography Company, Incorporated attorney's fees and costs relating to this Petition per Memorandum of Costs.
